commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

generation.compiledCode: var C=Object.defineProperty;var u=(t,e)=>C(t,"name",{value:e,configurable:!0});import{jsx as n,jsxs as m}from"react/jsx-runtime";const W={sunny:"\u2600\uFE0F",clear:"\u2600\uFE0F",cloudy:"\u2601\uFE0F","partly-cloudy":"\u26C5","mostly-cloudy":"\u{1F325}\uFE0F",rainy:"\u{1F327}\uFE0F",rain:"\u{1F327}\uFE0F",showers:"\u{1F326}\uFE0F",thunderstorm:"\u26C8\uFE0F",snowy:"\u2744\uFE0F",snow:"\u2744\uFE0F",windy:"\u{1F4A8}",mist:"\u{1F32B}\uFE0F",fog:"\u{1F32B}\uFE0F"},v="\u2753",F={metric:{temp:"\xB0C",speed:"km/h"},imperial:{temp:"\xB0F",speed:"mph"}},S="metric";function T(t){const{temperature:e,condition:a,humidity:i,windSpeed:s,unit:c="C",forecast:d}=t;return useMemo(()=>{const r=c,p=r==="C"?"km/h":"mph",g=`${e}\xB0${r}`,y=`${s} ${p}`,f=`${i}%`,l=(()=>{const o=a.toLowerCase();return o==="sunny"?"\u2600\uFE0F":o==="cloudy"?"\u2601\uFE0F":o==="rainy"?"\u{1F327}\uFE0F":o==="snowy"?"\u2744\uFE0F":"\u{1F321}\uFE0F"})(),h=d.map(o=>({...o,formattedHigh:`${o.high}\xB0`,formattedLow:`${o.low}\xB0`}));return{formattedTemp:g,formattedWind:y,formattedHumidity:f,conditionIcon:l,forecastItems:h}},[e,a,i,s,c,d])}u(T,"useWeatherLogic");const H=u(t=>{const{formattedTemp:e,formattedWind:a,formattedHumidity:i,conditionIcon:s,forecastItems:c}=useWeather(t),{city:d,condition:r}=t;return n(Card,{padding:"var(--ggui-spacing-6)",border:!0,children:m(Stack,{gap:"var(--ggui-spacing-6)",children:[n(WeatherHeader,{city:d,condition:r}),n(MainTemp,{value:e,condition:r,icon:s}),m(Row,{gap:"var(--ggui-spacing-4)",justify:"around",children:[n(StatItem,{label:"Humidity",value:i}),n(StatItem,{label:"Wind Speed",value:a})]}),n(Divider,{margin:"var(--ggui-spacing-6)"}),n(ForecastStrip,{days:c})]})})},"WeatherCard");function w(t){const e=useComponent(t);return n(ComponentUI,{...t,...e})}u(w,"Component");export{w as default};

evaluation.critique: The component has a solid structure with proper use of ggui primitives and design tokens, but there are inconsistencies in token usage (hardcoded gap values like gap={2}, gap={4}, gap={1}), missing hover/focus states on interactive forecast items, and the component source is incomplete (truncated at ui.tsx). The data presentation is mostly correct, pulling from props without hardcoding weather data.
